content: fitdecode is the correct choice over fitparse for new projects. fitparse (python-fitparse) is inactive per Snyk as of Jan 2026 - no PyPI releases in 12+ months, maintainer seeking handoff. fitdecode is an incompatible rewrite with thread-safety, CRC flexibility, binary-level access, and chained FIT file support. Python 3.6+ required. The fitparse maintainer explicitly recommends fitdecode as the alternative.
